title: 2025 isn't forecastable. But we will try.
section_path: 2025 isn't forecastable. But we will try.
section_path_text: 2025 isn't forecastable. But we will try.
summary:
Main
The Five Questions for Investors in 2025
What will the nature and intensity of trade wars be? How long can US exceptionalism last? How much more can nations borrow?
